title: Clawd LLM Observability
description: LLM proxy request log — costs, latency, errors per user

cost-by-user.title: Cost by user (all time)
cost-by-user.sql: SELECT user_id, COUNT(*) AS requests, SUM(tokens_in) AS tokens_in, SUM(tokens_out) AS tokens_out, ROUND(SUM(cost_usd), 4) AS total_usd FROM llm_requests GROUP BY user_id ORDER BY total_usd DESC

cost-by-user-today.title: Cost by user — today
cost-by-user-today.sql: SELECT user_id, COUNT(*) AS requests, ROUND(SUM(cost_usd), 4) AS total_usd FROM llm_requests WHERE date(timestamp) = date('now') GROUP BY user_id ORDER BY total_usd DESC

cost-by-analyst.title: Cost by analyst type
cost-by-analyst.sql: SELECT analyst, COUNT(*) AS requests, ROUND(SUM(cost_usd), 4) AS total_usd, ROUND(AVG(cost_usd), 6) AS avg_usd FROM llm_requests GROUP BY analyst ORDER BY total_usd DESC

cost-by-model.title: Cost by model
cost-by-model.sql: SELECT model, COUNT(*) AS requests, ROUND(SUM(cost_usd), 4) AS total_usd, ROUND(AVG(latency_ms)) AS avg_latency_ms FROM llm_requests GROUP BY model ORDER BY total_usd DESC

daily-spend.title: Daily spend (last 14 days)
daily-spend.sql: SELECT date(timestamp) AS day, COUNT(*) AS requests, ROUND(SUM(cost_usd), 4) AS total_usd FROM llm_requests WHERE timestamp >= datetime('now', '-14 days') GROUP BY day ORDER BY day DESC

errors.title: Errors
errors.sql: SELECT timestamp, user_id, analyst, model, status, error_message FROM llm_requests WHERE status != 'success' ORDER BY timestamp DESC LIMIT 100

slowest-requests.title: Slowest requests
slowest-requests.sql: SELECT timestamp, user_id, analyst, model, ticker, latency_ms, ROUND(cost_usd, 6) AS cost_usd FROM llm_requests ORDER BY latency_ms DESC LIMIT 50

per-ticker.title: Cost per ticker
per-ticker.sql: SELECT ticker, COUNT(*) AS requests, ROUND(SUM(cost_usd), 4) AS total_usd FROM llm_requests WHERE ticker IS NOT NULL GROUP BY ticker ORDER BY total_usd DESC

recent.title: Recent requests (last 100)
recent.sql: SELECT timestamp, user_id, analyst, model, ticker, tokens_in, tokens_out, ROUND(cost_usd, 6) AS cost_usd, latency_ms, status FROM llm_requests ORDER BY timestamp DESC LIMIT 100
